panels.description: Medium shot: The Doctor, a sharp-featured man in an 18th-century coat, and the Squire, a burly man in fine travel attire, lean over a weathered wooden table in a dimly lit room. A single candle illuminates a thick, tattered logbook. The Doctor points to the cover with a look of anticipation. Cinematic lighting, detailed wood texture.

bubbles.text: First of all we'll try the book

panels.description: Wide shot: A detailed view of the first page of the captain's logbook. Yellowed, stained parchment filled with rough, messy ink inscriptions: 'Billy Bones his fancy', 'Mr. W. Bones, mate', and 'No more rum'. The handwriting is jagged and difficult to read.

bubbles.text: On the first page there were only some scraps of writing... 'Billy Bones his fancy'; 'Mr. W. Bones, mate,' 'No more rum,' 'Off Palm Key he got itt.'

panels.description: Medium close shot: The Doctor looks up from the book with a grim, knowing smile. The narrator, Jim, is partially visible looking over his shoulder. Dark shadows fill the study, focusing on the Doctor's analytical gaze as he comments on the text.

bubbles.text: I could not help wondering who it was that had 'got itt,' and what 'itt' was that he got.
A knife in his back as like as not. Not much instruction there.

panels.description: Medium shot: The Doctor flips through the logbook, revealing columns of figures and dates spanning nearly twenty years. Jim looks on with a look of utter confusion. The atmosphere is quiet and studious, lit by the flickering candle and surrounding darkness.

bubbles.text: I can't make head or tail of this.

panels.description: Medium close shot: The Doctor’s eyes light up with sudden realization. He holds a finger up to emphasize his point, leaning closer to the logbook's final total. His expression is one of intellectual triumph against the dark background.

bubbles.text: The thing is as clear as noonday. Right! See what it is to be a traveller.
Right! And the amounts increase, you see, as he rose in rank.

panels.description: Medium shot: The Doctor closes the logbook firmly with a thud. The Squire leans in closer, looking impressed and intrigued. The Doctor reaches for a second, sealed packet on the table, moving the scene toward the next mystery.

bubbles.text: Thrifty man! He wasn't the one to be cheated. Now, and the other.

panels.description: Close up shot: The Doctor's surgical, precise hands carefully peel back the red wax seals on a new bundle of papers. The seals bear the distinct, circular impression of a simple thimble. High focus on the texture of the wax and the parchment beneath.

bubbles.text: The paper had been sealed in several places with a thimble... the doctor opened the seals with great care.
